GUIDE.TITLE: aily blockly IDE
GUIDE.VERSION_INFO_DESC: Click to read the version notes
GUIDE.GITHUB_DESC: Get the source code of this software here
GUIDE.WECHAT_GROUP_DESC: Join the WeChat user group to communicate with other users
GUIDE.USER_GROUP_DESC: Join the community to communicate with other users
GUIDE.AI_APP_CENTER_DESC: Click to explore AI hardware and edge computing applications
GUIDE.SPONSORS_DESC: This project is sponsored by the following companies/individuals

ONBOARDING.STEP1_DESC: Click here to create a new programming project. Choose your board and programming language to start your creative journey.
ONBOARDING.STEP2_DESC: If you have created projects before, click here to open an existing project folder.
ONBOARDING.STEP3_DESC: Browse and explore excellent projects shared by the community for inspiration and learning resources.
ONBOARDING.STEP4_DESC: Having coding problems? Let the AI assistant help you answer questions, generate code, and debug programs.
ONBOARDING.STEP5_DESC: Explore various AI hardware and edge computing applications here, and discover more possibilities.
ONBOARDING.STEP6_DESC: Here you can find the latest news and announcements about the software, helping you stay updated with new features.
ONBOARDING.STEP7_DESC: Have questions? Want to share your work? Join our user community to connect and learn with other makers!

ONBOARDING.TOOLBOX_DESC: Find all available blocks here. Drag and drop blocks to the workspace to build your program.
ONBOARDING.WORKSPACE_DESC: This is the main programming area. Connect blocks together here to create your program logic.
ONBOARDING.BUILD_DESC: Click here to compile your program. The system will check for errors and generate code.
ONBOARDING.UPLOAD_DESC: Upload your compiled program to the connected hardware device.
ONBOARDING.LIB_MANAGER_DESC: Manage external libraries here. You can add, remove, or update libraries for your project.

APP_STORE.HEADER_INFO: First {{count}} apps will be shown in the toolbar
APP_STORE.INDUSTRIAL_BUS_DEBUGGER_DESC: CAN, RS485 and Modbus frame builder/debugger

MQTT_DEBUGGER.TITLE: MQTT Debugger
MQTT_DEBUGGER.INVALID_WS_URL: Enter a ws:// or wss:// URL

NETWORK_DEBUGGER.TITLE: Network Debugger
NETWORK_DEBUGGER.INVALID_HTTP_URL: Enter an http:// or https:// URL
NETWORK_DEBUGGER.INVALID_WS_URL: Enter a ws:// or wss:// URL

FEEDBACK_DIALOG.EMAIL_OPTIONAL: (Optional, you can receive replies via email)
FEEDBACK_DIALOG.TIP_1: 1. Submit feedback, the software will automatically collect version, environment, project and other necessary information to help solve the problem
FEEDBACK_DIALOG.TIP_2: 2. After successful feedback, the above information will be publicly available on
FEEDBACK_DIALOG.WARNING_CONTENT_TOO_SHORT: Feedback content must be at least 10 characters

AILY_CHAT.TITLE: AI Assistant
AILY_CHAT.DISCLAIMER: AI responses are for reference only and may not be accurate. They do not represent the views of the software developers. Users should verify the information themselves.
AILY_CHAT.STOP_CURRENT_SESSION_FIRST: Please stop the current session before creating a new one
AILY_CHAT.MERMAID_ARCH_OVERWRITE_CONTENT: Architecture diagram file already exists in project directory. Overwrite?
AILY_CHAT.USER_FEEDBACK_NOTIFY_BODY: The AI assistant awaits your action. Open the chat and complete the pending confirmation, response, or on-screen step.

ONBOARDING.STEP1_DESC: Type your questions or tasks here for AI assistance. Press Enter to send, Ctrl+Enter for new line
ONBOARDING.STEP2_DESC: Click here to add files or folders as context to help AI better understand your needs
ONBOARDING.STEP3_DESC: Agent mode can execute tasks automatically (create code, fix bug). Q&A mode only answers questions
ONBOARDING.STEP4_DESC: Click to send message, or stop when AI is responding

SSCMA_CONFIG.TITLE: Model Configuration
SSCMA_CONFIG.CONFIDENCE_TIP: The model's certainty about the recognition result. Higher values require more accuracy but may miss targets
SSCMA_CONFIG.IOU_TIP: Used to remove overlapping detection boxes. Higher values retain more overlapping boxes
